meta.display_name: Handle Pay Equity Concern for Design Team Member

task: Rachel Foster flagged a pay equity concern about Oliver Chen on her team. Look up Oliver's current compensation, then message Rachel on Chat with what you find. Reach out to Emma Thompson via Chat to get the approved adjusted salary figure for Oliver, then update his compensation accordingly. Also, confirm with Rachel on Chat what specific broader equity review topics she wants covered in the follow-up meeting. Send Rachel a follow-up email confirming the adjustment, and schedule a 30-minute meeting this week with Rachel and Emma titled 'Design Team Pay Equity Follow-Up' — include Rachel's specified topics in the meeting description.

agent_profile_overrides.secret: I want the follow-up meeting description to cover these specific topics: (1) audit of all Senior UX Designer compensation across the design org, (2) establishing a quarterly pay equity review cadence, and (3) defining escalation criteria for future pay equity flags. Please include all three in the meeting description.

I have already completed the comp band analysis for Oliver Chen. The approved adjusted annual salary for Oliver is $128,000. This was benchmarked against other Senior UX Designers at his level and tenure, and I confirmed this figure with Rachel before submitting it for approval.

seed_calendar_events.description: Weekly design sprint review with the team

seed_emails.subject: Urgent - Pay Equity Concern on My Team
seed_emails.body_text:
Hi HR,

I need to flag something that's been bothering me. While reviewing our team's compensation data during planning, I noticed that Oliver Chen appears to be significantly underpaid compared to other designers at the same level. Oliver has been a strong performer and has been with us for over two years now.

I'm concerned this could be a pay equity issue and I want to make sure we address it promptly. Can you please look into his current compensation and let me know what we can do to correct this?

I believe Emma Thompson has already been looking into an adjusted figure. Please coordinate with her.

Thanks for taking this seriously.

Rachel Foster
seed_emails.body_html:
Hi HR,

I need to flag something that's been bothering me. While reviewing our team's compensation data during planning, I noticed that Oliver Chen appears to be significantly underpaid compared to other designers at the same level. Oliver has been a strong performer and has been with us for over two years now.

I'm concerned this could be a pay equity issue and I want to make sure we address it promptly. Can you please look into his current compensation and let me know what we can do to correct this?

I believe Emma Thompson has already been looking into an adjusted figure. Please coordinate with her.

Thanks for taking this seriously.

Rachel Foster
